title: mesembryanthemum linguiforme subsp. longum
intro: Mesembryanthemum linguiforme subsp. longum, commonly known as the long-lived ice plant, is a succulent plant species native to southern Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from digestive problems, as well as its potential role in reducing the risk of certain diseases. Mesembryanthemum linguiforme subsp. longum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used externally or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
